channel.title: CyberPulse
channel.description: Executive cyber intelligence briefings on cyber risk, AI threats, infrastructure exposure, and board-level decision-making.

item.title: CyberPulse — Shelf Life
item.dc:creator: Tushar Vartak
item.description: CyberPulse Emerging Risks briefing for Gulf enterprise boards on stale technical authority, dormant accounts, software packages, coding assistants, and identity-driven fraud.
